name: Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF
summary: PART I Item 1. B usiness Overview of the Trust and the Shares Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust ETF (formerly known as Grayscale Bitcoin Mini Trust (BTC)) (the Trust) is a Delaware Statutory Trust that was formed on March 12, 2024, by the filing of the Certificate of Trust with the Delaware Secretary of State in accordance with the provisions of the Delaware Statutory Trust Act.
